Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BULLET TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_EXTERNAL_TITLE TEXT_255_,
VARIANT_GROUP_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_ASSIGNMENT_OFFLINE_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_ASSIGNMENT_ONLINE_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_ASSIGNMNET_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE DATETIME,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING INTEGER,
VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE INTEGER,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the variant product (events_products_variants_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE is
'Variant Article Approved Status Code (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_articleApprovedStatusCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_BULLET is
'Variant External Bullets (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_externalBullets )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE is
'Variant External Key Product Features (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_externalKeyProductFeatures )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION is
'Variant External Product Description (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_externalProductDescription )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_EXTERNAL_TITLE is
'Variant External Title (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_externalTitle )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_GROUP_CODE_BK is
'Variant Group ID (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_groupId )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_ASSIGNMENT_OFFLINE_DATE is
'Variant Offline Date (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_ASSIGNMENT_ONLINE_DATE is
'Variant Online Date (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_ASSIGNMNET_PRE_ORDER_END_DATE is
'Variant Pre-order End Date (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_preOrderDateUntil )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Variant Product Version Active (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_active )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN_BK is
'Variant Product Version EAN (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_ean )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Variant Product Version PMI Product Code (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_pmiProductCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING is
'Variant Product Version Ranking (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_ranking )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VARIANT_PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE is
'Variant Product Version Split Rate (events_products_variants_availabilityAssignments_productVersions_splitRate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Card of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE , __LOAD_TS


Check constraint name of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

CKC_RDE_PRODUCT_CATAL_RDE_PROD

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

 

and __LOAD_TS in <T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.__LOAD_TS , T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_TO)

 

Detailed logic in attached query


Check constraint name of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
